introSection:
Toboggan was a steel roller coaster located at Conneaut Lake Park in Conneaut Lake, Pennsylvania, USA. The ride operated from 2002 to 2006, after which it was left standing but not operating. It was taken down after the 2014 season and placed in storage outside, where it remained until 2022.

The ride was purchased by Conneaut Lake Park from a park or a fair in Texas.
fullText:
Toboggan was a steel roller coaster located at Conneaut Lake Park in Conneaut Lake, Pennsylvania, USA. The ride operated from 2002 to 2006, after which it was left standing but not operating. It was taken down after the 2014 season and placed in storage outside, where it remained until 2022.

The ride was purchased by Conneaut Lake Park from a park or a fair in Texas.
